sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4472" key="a)lloi/wma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοί-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n4472.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ωσις</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0438.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Damox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
